turns.speaker: D
turns.text: next patient is grace ross . date of birth 8-23-97 . ms. ross is a new patient . grace ross is here today for a full spectrum std testing . the patient states that grace ross is having symptoms of discomfort , a change in discharge , and odor in grace ross's vaginal region . grace ross says that the right side of grace ross's vagina is starting to become painful . grace ross denies any fevers or chills . grace ross reports , that grace ross recently learned , grace ross's partner has been in sexual encounters with other people , and grace ross wants to be evaluated for all stds . hello , ms. ross . i'm dr. diaz . it's good to meet you .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi . yes . nice to meet dr. diaz , too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , how is grace ross doing today ? dr. diaz hears that grace ross is here for std testing . is std testing correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . actually , grace ross found out earlier this week , that grace ross's boyfriend has been cheating on grace ross , for some time . grace ross is really worried , that grace ross could have caught something , you know ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: grace ross wanted to make sure grace ross do n't have anything .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah . dr. diaz is sorry to hear that . of course , dr. diaz can do std testing today . um . well , let's see . how does grace ross feel ? does grace ross have any symptoms ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , um , grace ross started noticing some weird discharge last week .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , the discharge smells different . the discharge is not the same color , or consistency , as usually , the discharge is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: right .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um . the discharge part did n't even phase grace ross , until grace ross noticed that the right side of grace ross's vagina was hurting . just sore , you know , but the soreness has n't gone away .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yep . nah , the soreness does sound like a cause for concern . how long has grace ross been with grace ross's boyfriend ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hmm , grace ross and grace ross's boyfriend have been dating for three years .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: as far as , grace ross can figure , grace ross's boyfriend started cheating on grace ross , grace ross thinks , about three months ago .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh- . um , okay . does grace ross ... has grace ross ever had an irregular pap smear ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , yeah , grace ross did , but the irregular pap smear was back whenever grace ross was 20 or so . the irregular pap smear has n't ... and grace ross have n't had a pap smear since .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and when was grace ross's last pap smear ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , about six months ago . the pap smear came back normal , though .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . good , okay . well , let's see ... let's take a look at grace ross , and then , dr. diaz will get some samples for std testing . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: grace ross will hear dr. diaz talk through grace ross's exam , so that dr. diaz can get the exam all documented . uh- ? use dr. diaz's general physical exam template . pelvic exam demonstrates no external lesions . normal labia majora and labia minora . normal physiological discharge , with normal color and smell . ms. ross , dr. diaz is going to touch grace ross , now . grace ross will feel dr. diaz's fingers , and the speculum in grace ross's vagina . grace ross will feel some pressure , now . cervix is normal . vaginal wall is normal . no cervical motion tenderness and no adnexal tenderness or masses noted . swabs were done for std testing . okay , ms. ross . everything looks good from a visual standpoint . dr. diaz is going to send off std testing for , uh , gonorrhea , chlamydia , trichomoniasis , and dr. diaz will have grace ross give some blood for syphilis , hiv and hepatitis c. some of these tests will take longer than other tests . dr. diaz and the clinic will call grace ross , if dr. diaz and the clinic see anything , but if grace ross have n't heard anything , grace ross can call dr. diaz and the clinic in three days for results .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . sounds good . thank dr. diaz , so much .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: of course , dr. diaz's pleasure . and , if everything is normal , dr. diaz will see grace ross again , at grace ross's next annual checkup . assessment : is screen for std . plan : discussed with patient , and please add that grace ross is high risk due to an abnormal pap smear in the past , and the recent discovery of grace ross's sexual partner having multiple partners , for some period of time . end of recording .
